name: Mapping Component
description: The `mapping` component allows you to create a map or dictionary that allows a one-to-one translation from keys to values. This enables e.g. mapping a string to a number or vice versa, or mapping a string such as a weather condition to an image.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Give the mapping an ID so that you can refer to it later in [lambdas](https://esphome.io/automations/templates#config-lambda).

config_entries.label: From
config_entries.description: The type of the keys in the mapping. Can be one of `string` or `int`.

config_entries.label: To
config_entries.description: The type of values in the map. May be one of `string` or `int` or a class specifier as discussed below.
